A rigid tank contains 1 kg of saturated liquid-vapour mixture at 40°C. The water is slowly heated until it reached to a single phase, the volume of container is 2 litre. If the critical volume of water is 0.003106 m3/kg, then the final phase of the water is

Correct answer: A
Solution

(a)

 
Q2 Not checked
Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +2 / -0
Not attempted

Helium gas is kept in a rigid container at a temperature of 400 K. The temperature of this gas is maintained constant by a heater of 10 Watt (kept inside the container) if surrounding temperature is 27°C then which of the following statements is/are correct?

Correct answer: N/A
Solution

(b, d)

 
Q3 Not checked
Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +2 / -0
Not attempted

A balloon of 40 cm diameter is filled with air at 1 bar and 27°C. It is heated to 500°C and as a result the diameter increases to 50 cm. During the heating process the pressure varies linearly with the diameter, rising to a maximum value of 1.5 bar. If the change in internal energy of air is
given by ΔU = (5 + 4ΔT) J, (ΔT change in temperature in Kelvin), then the heat transferred to the balloon is ________ . [Correct upto two decimal places]

NAT
Correct answer: 5948.35
Solution

5948.35 (5948.10 - 5949.50)

 
Q4 Not checked
Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +1 / -0.33
Not attempted

In a heat treatment process, an iron block weighing 120 kg is heated to 600°C and then immersed in a quenching bath containing 800 kg of salt solution at 40°C. If the total heat loss to surroundings during the process is 1500 kJ, the final steady state temperature is,
[Take, (CP)iron block = 0.5 kJ/kgK; (CP)salt solution = 3.5 kJ/kgK]

Correct answer: C
Solution

(c)

 
Q5 Not checked
Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +2 / -0
Not attempted

Air is trapped in a piston-cylinder arrangement. Initially P1 is 101 kPa, V1 is 3 × 10–3 m3. The spring exerts no force on the piston in the initial position. The area of the piston is 0.014 m2. The air expands slowly until its volume is doubled. During the process, the spring exerts a force
linearly. Neglect any friction between piston and cylinder wall. Which of the following statements are correct? [Take, kspring = 18 × 103 N/m]

Correct answer: N/A
Solution

(b, d)

 
 
 
Q6 Not checked
Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +2 / -0
Not attempted

At the beginning of the compression stroke of a two-cylinder internal combustion engine the air is at a pressure of 101 kPa. Compression reduces the volume to  of its volume, and the law of compression is given by constant. The bore and stroke of each cylinder is 0.14 m and 0.28 m, respectively. If the engine speed is such that each cylinder undergoes 600 compression strokes per minute, then the power absorbed is _______ kW. [Correct upto two decimal places]

NAT
Correct answer: -13.91
Solution

-13.91 (-13.85 - -13.95)

 
Q7 Not checked
Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +2 / -0
Not attempted

The tangential force acting on the cutting tool of a lathe while turning a metallic workpiece of 80 mm diameter is 180 N. After 8 minutes of turning the internal energy of the workpiece and chips increases by 80 kJ. If the frequency of revolution of the workpiece is 250 rev/min, the heat transfer from the workpiece and chips during this period is _____ kJ. [Correct upto two decimal places]

NAT
Correct answer: 10.48
Solution

10.48 (10.30 - 10.60)

 
Q8 Not checked
Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +2 / -0.66
Not attempted

A slow chemical reaction takes place in a fluid at the constant pressure of 0.1 MPa. The fluid is surrounding by a perfect heat insulator during the reaction which begins at state 1 and ends at state 2. The insulation is then removed and 100 kJ of heat flows to the surroundings as the fluid
goes to state 3, the following data are observed for the fluid at state 1, 2 and 3.

 
 
For the fluid, which of the state is correct?
Correct answer: D
Solution

(d)

 
Q9 Not checked
Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +2 / -0
Not attempted

A steel rod of mass 2 kg is being heated by quenching it from an initial temperature of 200°C in a tank containing 12 kg of water at 45°C. Neglecting any heat loss to the surrounding, which are at 27°C. The total change in exergy is ______ kJ. [Correct upto two decimal places]
Take specific heat of steel = 0.5 kJ/kgK Specific heat of water = 4.2 kJ/kgK

NAT
Correct answer: -26.42
Solution

-26.42 (-26.82 - -26.22)

The efficiency of the cycle is
Correct answer: A
Solution

(a)

Correct answer: -5.94
Solution

Correct answer: -9.12
Solution

Solution

NAT
Correct answer: 6.69
Solution

6.69 (6.67 - 6.71)

Correct answer: 679.44
Solution

Correct answer: D
Solution

(d)

NAT
Correct answer: 0.2023
Solution

0.2023 (0.2001 - 0.2111)

Correct answer: A
Solution

(a)
